nasb.text: Samuel did not see Saul again until the day of his death; for Samuel grieved over Saul. And the Lord regretted that He had made Saul king over Israel.

esv.text: And Samuel did not see Saul again until the day of his death, but Samuel grieved over Saul. And the Lord regretted that he had made Saul king over Israel.

cnv.text: 撒母耳直到死的日子，再沒有看見掃羅。撒母耳為掃羅悲傷，因為耶和華後悔立了掃羅作以色列的王。

ccb.text: 撒母耳一直到死没有再见扫罗，但他为扫罗哀伤。耶和华后悔立扫罗做以色列王。
